name: Heavenly Heart Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two heart-shaped pans or two 9-inch round baking pans.
2. In a small bowl, stir together cocoa and boiling water until smooth. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar until fluffy. Add vanilla and eggs; mix well.
4. Alternately add flour mixture to the butter mixture. Stir in buttermilk or sour milk.
5. Pour batter into prepared pans. Bake 30-35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool pans for 10 minutes, then remove cakes to wire racks. Allow to cool completely.
6. Prepare GLOSSY CHOCOLATE SOUR CREAM FROSTING:
- In a medium microwave-safe bowl, melt chocolate chips by microwaving for 1 minute (or until melted when stirred). Add powdered sugar, sour cream, and vanilla; beat until smooth. Add milk gradually for a thinner consistency.
7. Prepare CREAMY BUTTERCREAM FROSTING: Beat together powdered sugar, softened butter or margarine, milk, and vanilla extract until smooth.
8. Frost the cooled cake layers with GLOSSY CHOCOLATE SOUR CREAM FROSTING. Pipe a border around the top edge and base of the cake using CREAMY BUTTERCREAM FROSTING. Garnish as desired.
To make sour milk: Mix 2 teaspoons white vinegar with equal amounts of milk to achieve 3/4 cup.
